title: Sweet Potato Crumble
description: A delicious sweet potato dessert topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.
instructions: Pierce the sweet potatoes with a fork several times and bake for 45-60 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, mix the crumble and grated potato in a bowl.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, let them cool slightly.
Top each sweet potato with the crumble mixture and a sprinkle of crushed crispy.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
